q_sam_wolves.name: Fangs in the Ash
q_sam_wolves.desc: Wolves grown bold on corpse-meat circle the village at night. Thin the pack — four should do.
offer: The wolves have learned what battlefields leave behind. They circle us at night now.
Four of them lead the pack. Kill them on the province roads and my people sleep again.
q_sam_wolves.mid: The howling was closer last night. Please hurry.
turnin: The nights are quiet again. Take this — the village owes you more than it can pay.

stages.text: Hunt Grey Wolves on the province roads

q_biz_papers.name: Paper Trail
q_biz_papers.desc: Yui can rebuild the shredded ledgers — if you liberate 3 pages from the thugs carrying them.
offer: Mori-san! I know what they did to your accounts. I was the one who flagged the discrepancy, I am SO sorry.
The thugs carry the shredded pages in their jackets — too lazy to burn them. Bring me three and I can rebuild a month of laundering.
q_biz_papers.mid: Check the thugs' jackets! Paper doesn't punch back, I promise.
turnin: Cross-referenced with the offshore transfers — Mori-san, this is a SMOKING GUN. Take my emergency fund. And my lucky tiepin!

stages.text: Take Shredded Ledger Pages from Yakuza Thugs

q_cyb_parts.name: Servo Salvage
q_cyb_parts.desc: Juno needs 3 milspec servo cores. Scav drones are full of them. Full of bullets works too.
offer: Vex! My supplier got "nationalized". I need milspec servo cores — three — or half this bazaar stops running.
Drones carry them. They explode if you ask nicely with a railgun.
q_cyb_parts.mid: Cores, Vex. The noodle stall's fryer is running on hope and one capacitor.
turnin: Beautiful. Barely dented! The bazaar eats tonight. Here — creds, and take the boots. Fell off a courier. The courier was fine. Mostly.
